plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data AI Search OpenAI js Local Debug

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option from the dropdown menu in the "New Project" window.
Click the "General Teams Agent" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" menu.
Click the "Azure AI Search" option in the "Select an option to load your data" dropdown within the "Teams Agent with Data" window of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code while configuring a Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit project.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the directory for the project location (`/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects`).
Click the "Type a message" input box at the bottom of the Microsoft Teams web app chat interface.
Type 'list contoso history in table' into the message input box at the bottom of a Microsoft Teams web app chat window within the 'vscuse_app_7Qy44local' tab.
Press Enter to submit the typed message "list contoso history in table" in the message input box of the Microsoft Teams web app.
